fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 67 incorrectly triggers the removal of a valid element on line 68 when inputs share the same last element, violating the merge contract.

spec.expr: not (merged__1 and left and right and merged__1[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])

constraints.intent: The condition to remove an element should not be met, as all elements from the inputs must be preserved.
In the branch where an element is removed, the list's length becomes incorrect.
The count of the shared last element must be preserved, but is incorrectly reduced in this branch.
The final merged list must contain every element from both inputs.
